title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Reiju, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Pudding as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Always giving me the cold shoulder...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been 13 years since you got to spend some quality time with your older sister...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do I have to repeat myself?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I made it crystal clear that I wanted nothing to do with any of you!! We're no longer family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only a lunatic would want to be part of a family with bad enough taste to put up a picture like this as interior decoration!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A photo taken in North Blue During the infamous incident known as the "Four Nation coup":

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our father's dream is for germa to rule over the entirety of the Northern Seas once more.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nothing's wrong with a man brandishing his fame and power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could be here... taking full advantage of your Royal Blood...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Instead you choose to gallavant alongside some puny pirate crew while leading a mundane life. :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look here! These 10 maids would be at your beck and call.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will do as your heart desires, Prince Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's all possible because you are royalty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have soldiers who would lay down their lives for you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And money will never be a problem here. What could you possibly have to complain about?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Vinsmokes have obtained so much over the generations with brute strength...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you too are a blood member of this family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit the sales pitch... I've got no intention of marrying that girl!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't pudding such a sweetheart though? I really like her a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Commander, where are you heading off to?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: The room Sanji is in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: father, to what do we owe the pleasure?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You enjoy being a huge pain in my ass?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: King of German kingdom (commander of the German 66) VINSMOKE JAJJJJJJI* t/n: as a) was just

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: BAS- TARD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Son, I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Quit calling me that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I were to admit that I have a parent...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It sure as hell wouldn't be you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Did you do something to youji?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll have you know that boy's strength is quite formi- dable.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I suppose mine just happens to be more so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's take this outside...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Men can only speak clearly with one another using their fists.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji vs "Father"? A family reunion the Vinsmoke Way!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
